title: UGC 'Good Morning' Wake Up Vlog
description: Hyper-realistic UGC-style 'good morning' moment. Natural American blonde waking up in a coastal Pinterest bedroom. Propped iPhone feel.

prompt.concept: Hyper-realistic UGC-style 'good morning' moment, shot like a real iPhone selfie video. The natural American blonde girl is waking up in her airy USA-coastal Pinterest bedroom. Her iPhone is propped up on the nightstand at a slightly imperfect angle — feels like she set it up herself for a casual morning vlog. She stirs under her white linen duvet, slowly opens her eyes, sits up, runs a hand through her tousled hair, and stretches with a sleepy smile. Looks like authentic iPhone footage, not a cinematic production.

format.platform_look: raw iPhone UGC / morning vlog Reel

shot_aesthetic.device_simulation: shot on iPhone 15/16 front or back camera, native iOS color science
look_and_feel: natural iPhone lens compression and very mild barrel distortion
iPhone-style auto-exposure that subtly shifts as she moves into the light
iPhone auto-white-balance with slight cool morning shift
very mild lens flare from the window
natural iPhone sharpening — sharp on faces but with realistic skin texture
barely-there compression artifacts in shadows for authenticity
no cinema-grade color grade, no LUT, no film grain — just clean iPhone-native look

character.ethnicity: American (white, Southern California / clean girl-next-door look)
character.build: athletic and feminine — sporty toned shoulders and arms, defined collarbones, slim waist, soft natural curves; pilates-and-runs body
character.skin: fair, naturally glowy with a hint of sun-kissed warmth, subtle freckles across the bridge of her nose and cheekbones, a tiny natural sleep-mark on one cheek, real visible pores and skin texture
character.hair: long, natural beachy-wavy honey blonde with subtle lighter highlights, soft middle part, tousled and messy from sleep, falling past her shoulders
character.makeup: barely-there 'just woke up' — clean bare skin, no visible makeup, soft naturally-pink lips, faint smudge of yesterday's mascara at the corner of one eye, full natural brows
character.eyes: warm blue or soft hazel, sleepy and squinting in the morning light
character.face: soft natural face — small natural imperfections (a tiny mole, faint freckles), real human texture, NOT airbrushed or AI-plastic
character.expression_arc: still asleep → small stir → soft squint as eyes open → sleepy slow blink → small genuine sleepy smile
character.vibe: authentic American girl-next-door, real and approachable — looks like a real person filming a real morning

wardrobe.top: soft oversized vintage-style white cotton t-shirt with a slightly stretched neckline, plain (no logos or text), the collar slipped a bit off one shoulder from sleep
wardrobe.bottoms: barely visible under the duvet — soft cotton boy shorts or light grey lounge shorts
wardrobe.jewelry: one thin gold necklace and a small gold ring she wore to bed (lived-in detail)
wardrobe.nails: short oval, soft milky-pink, slightly chipped on one nail for realism

setting.location: airy USA-coastal Pinterest bedroom (Southern California / Hamptons vibe)
details: white-painted shiplap or smooth white walls
queen bed with crisp white linen bedding, soft cream waffle blanket folded at the foot, two stacked white linen pillows with one accent pillow in soft sage
light natural oak bed frame, low and modern
tall double-hung white window with sheer white linen curtains gently swaying, soft morning light filtering through
view through the window of soft green leaves and a hint of blue sky

light oak nightstand with: a clear glass of water with a lemon slice, a small stack of two paperback novels, a tortoiseshell hair clip, a tiny glass jar with one wildflower stem, a vintage analog alarm clock with a white face
soft beige jute rug on light wide-plank oak floors
a white-painted vintage dresser at the edge of frame with framed Polaroids casually leaning against the wall
warm-white fairy lights softly draped along the headboard
a tall snake plant or fiddle-leaf fig in a woven basket in the corner
an open paperback book face-down on the bed, like she fell asleep reading
color palette: cool whites, light oak, soft sage, hints of warm cream

camera.device: iPhone propped on the nightstand at a slightly imperfect angle, leaning against a book or the lamp
camera.shot_type: medium-wide static phone shot, framing her from the head down to mid-torso with the window and headboard behind her
camera.framing_imperfection: the framing is slightly off-center and tilts about 1-2 degrees, like a real person propped their phone up casually — NOT studio-perfect composition
camera.angle: slightly low angle from the nightstand, looking across the bed at her
movement: the phone is technically static (propped up), but with very subtle micro-vibrations as someone breathes near it or the surface shifts slightly
barely perceptible drift, like a phone on a soft surface
absolutely no smooth gimbal motion — this should feel propped, not handheld and not on a tripod
camera.lens_feel: iPhone wide lens look, mild natural compression, sharp focus on her face with iPhone's natural depth
camera.auto_exposure: exposure subtly adjusts as she moves — slight brightening on her face when she sits up into the light, very natural

lighting.key: soft cool morning daylight from the window, slightly cooler color temp — fresh real morning, not golden hour
lighting.rim: subtle backlight halo on her hair from the window, with a tiny natural lens flare across the iPhone lens
lighting.color_temp: around 5500K with a faint cool blue tint, iPhone auto-white-balance correcting throughout

action_timeline.beat: she's curled on her side under the duvet, hair fanned across the pillow, eyes closed, peaceful and still
tiny natural stir — her head shifts slightly on the pillow, fingers twitch lightly
slow squint as she opens her eyes against the morning light, real sleepy slow blinks
she pushes the duvet down with one hand and slowly sits up, t-shirt collar slipping further off one shoulder, hair tumbling forward
she runs her fingers slowly through her tousled hair, pushing it back from her face
she stretches both arms upward and slightly back, small natural yawn (covered with the back of her wrist)
lowers her arms, turns her head softly toward the window, gives the smallest genuine sleepy smile

performance_notes.tone: completely natural, unhurried, real — like candid iPhone footage of an actual morning
performance_notes.camera_awareness: she does NOT acknowledge the camera, does NOT look at it directly — feels like the phone just happens to be there
performance_notes.realism_priority: this should look like a real person filmed by their own propped iPhone, NOT a stylized cinematic production

ambient_sounds: very soft fabric rustle as she shifts
very soft morning room tone with iPhone-mic ambient noise floor (subtle realistic mic hiss)

no_text_no_graphics.iphone_ui_elements: no time/battery overlay, no recording indicator, no zoom controls — just the clean image
no_text_no_graphics.note: clean plate — all text and graphics will be added later in CapCut

audio.ambient: soft fabric rustle, tiny exhale, distant birds, gentle morning room tone, subtle natural iPhone-mic ambience
